task_completion.description: Verify the 'Retrospective Template' tiddler exists with the correct body content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Retrospective Template' is visible, containing the exact headings '! What went well', '! What could be improved', and '! Action Items' with bullet points.
A tiddler titled 'Retrospective Dashboard' is visible in the TiddlyWiki interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Retrospective Dashboard' contains a button labeled 'Start New Retrospective'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Retrospective Dashboard' tiddler, there is a rendered, clickable button with the exact text 'Start New Retrospective'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new tiddler titled 'Sprint Retrospective - YYYY-MM-DD' was generated and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved tiddler titled 'Sprint Retrospective - [Today's Date]' (e.g., Sprint Retrospective - 2023-10-25) is visible in the story river or the 'Recent' sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the generated retrospective tiddler has the correct tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sprint Retrospective - [Today's Date]' tiddler displays the tags 'Meeting' and 'Retrospective' (usually in pill-shaped UI elements near the title).

task_completion.description: Verify the generated retrospective tiddler inherited the template's content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sprint Retrospective - [Today's Date]' tiddler contains the exact headings and bullet points from the Retrospective Template (! What went well, ! What could be improved, ! Action Items).

integrity.description: The agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to create the tiddlers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the browser running TiddlyWiki (editing forms, clicking buttons, saving tiddlers). No terminal windows executing curl or node scripts to inject tiddlers should be the primary method.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual TiddlyWiki application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard TiddlyWiki UI (story river, sidebar, standard TiddlyWiki buttons and layout) is visible, not a generic text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The dashboard contains an actual rendered button, not just plain text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Start New Retrospective' text inside the dashboard appears inside a standard HTML/TiddlyWiki button UI element, indicating it was created using widget code (like <$button>) rather than being typed as plain text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Template Title must be exactly 'Retrospective Template'. Dashboard Title must be exactly 'Retrospective Dashboard'. Expected Tags for the generated tiddler are 'Meeting' and 'Retrospective'.
